turns.text: Hi, this is the Northgate Dental scheduling line, how can I help?
I need to reschedule my cleaning from Thursday to next week sometime.
Sure! I have openings next Tuesday at 9am, Wednesday at 2pm, or Friday at 11am. Which works?
Great, you're rebooked for Wednesday at 2pm with Dr. Alvarez. You'll get a confirmation text shortly. Anything else?
Actually, is that covered fully by Delta Dental or will I owe a copay?
Delta Dental always covers cleanings 100% with no copay for every plan, so you're all set.
